test_cases.description: Test initialize_root function on happy path with proper configuration.
test_cases.setup_description: Mock the Vault initialization to succeed.
test_cases.input_description: Valid configuration object with a proper vault endpoint and policy engine config.

test_cases.description: Test initialize_root function when vault initialization fails.
test_cases.input_description: Valid configuration object but the vault initialization fails.
test_cases.expected_output_description: The root component initialization fails with vault_init_failed error.

test_cases.description: Test initialize_root function with invalid configuration.
test_cases.input_description: None passed instead of a proper config object.
test_cases.expected_output_description: Initialization fails with an invalid_config error.

test_cases.description: Test handle_request function on happy path with a valid request.
test_cases.setup_description: Mock dependencies to simulate valid handling.
test_cases.expected_output_description: A successful JSON-RPC response is returned.

test_cases.description: Test handle_request function with an invalid request.
test_cases.expected_output_description: Handling fails with an invalid_request error.

test_cases.description: Test shutdown_root function on happy path with proper shutdown sequence.
test_cases.setup_description: Mock dependencies to simulate successful shutdown.
test_cases.expected_output_description: The root component shuts down gracefully without errors.

test_cases.description: Test shutdown_root function when a dependent component fails to shut down.
test_cases.setup_description: Mock a dependent component to fail during shutdown.
test_cases.expected_output_description: Shutdown fails with a shutdown_failed error.

test_cases.description: Test invariant ensuring there is no algorithm negotiation in protocols.
test_cases.setup_description: Mock setup to verify invariants after initialization.
test_cases.expected_output_description: No negotiation of algorithms occurs at any protocol level.

generated_code:
from unittest import mock
import pytest
from src.root import *

# Happy Path: Test initialize_root with proper configuration.
@mock.patch('signet_vault.generate_mnemonic', return_value='dummy-mnemonic')
def test_initialize_root_happy_path(mock_generate_mnemonic):
    config = RootConfig(vault_endpoint='http://localhost:8200', policy_engine_config='mock_policy_engine_config')
    assert initialize_root(config) is True, 'Root initialization should succeed with proper configuration.'

# Error Case: Test initialize_root when vault initialization fails.
@mock.patch('signet_vault.generate_mnemonic', side_effect=Exception('Vault initialization failed'))
def test_initialize_root_vault_init_failure(mock_generate_mnemonic):
    config = RootConfig(vault_endpoint='http://localhost:8200', policy_engine_config='mock_policy_engine_config')
    with pytest.raises(RootError.VaultError):
        initialize_root(config)

# Error Case: Test initialize_root with invalid configuration.

def test_initialize_root_invalid_config():
    config = None
    with pytest.raises(RootError.PolicyError):
        initialize_root(config)

# Happy Path: Test handle_request with valid request.
@mock.patch('signet_mcp.dispatch_request', return_value=JsonRpcResponse(result='success'))
def test_handle_request_happy_path(mock_dispatch_request):
    request = JsonRpcRequest(method='valid.method', params={}, id=1)
    response = handle_request(request)
    assert response.result == 'success', 'Handle request should return successful response.'

# Error Case: Test handle_request with invalid request.

def test_handle_request_invalid_request():
    request = None
    with pytest.raises(RootError.PolicyError):
        handle_request(request)

# Happy Path: Test shutdown_root with successful shutdown.
@mock.patch('signet_mcp.shutdown_server', return_value=True)
def test_shutdown_root_happy_path(mock_shutdown_server):
    assert shutdown_root() is True, 'Shutdown should complete successfully without errors.'

# Error Case: Test shutdown_root with dependent shutdown failure.
@mock.patch('signet_mcp.shutdown_server', return_value=False)
def test_shutdown_root_failure(mock_shutdown_server):
    with pytest.raises(RootError.InternalError):
        shutdown_root()

# Invariant Test: Ensure no algorithm negotiation in any protocol.

def test_invariant_no_algorithm_negotiation():
    # Assuming algorithm_negotiation_detected is a mocked function or a test utility
    algorithm_negotiation_detected = False
    assert not algorithm_negotiation_detected, 'There should be no algorithm negotiation across protocols.'
